codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly fulfills all feature requirements. Promotion thresholds are properly implemented: AntiPattern uses ≥5 confirmations with confidence >0.6, Convention uses ≥10 confirmations with confidence >0.8. The promotion system tracks confirmation counts, checks promotion eligibility, and provides retrieval rank boost for promoted patterns.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used cargo build, cargo test, and cargo clippy commands but .factory/services.yaml does not exist in this project. This is consistent with the pattern seen in other memory feature handoffs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: cargo build --workspace, cargo test -p swell-memory, cargo clippy --workspace. No services.yaml found at /Users/ludwigjonsson/.factory/services.yaml

summary: Feature mem-promotion-threshold passes scrutiny. Implementation correctly adds pattern promotion thresholds (≥5 confirmations with confidence >0.6 for patterns, ≥10 confirmations with confidence >0.8 for rules) with retrieval rank boost. 15 promotion tests were added covering boundary conditions. Worker followed Rust skill procedure correctly.
